title: hieracium juratzkanum
intro: Hieracium juratzkanum, also known as Juratzka's hawkweed or Juratzka's hawkbit, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as being used to treat various skin conditions. Hieracium juratzkanum can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, which can be used to support the treatment of various health issues.
